description_long: This is a sleek, futuristic airplane with a sharply pointed nose and a streamlined, angular fuselage finished in matte black. The body is relatively flat and wide, with subtle panel lines and geometric surface details that suggest advanced composite construction. The wings are integrated into the main body, giving it a blended wing-body appearance, and there are no visible traditional wing protrusions, indicating a stealth or advanced design. The landing gear consists of two main wheels and a smaller nose wheel, all of which appear retractable. The cockpit is set forward and is enclosed, with a tinted canopy and digital display panels visible on the sides. Small, illuminated accents and vents are present, adding to the high-tech, tactical aesthetic.
description: A matte black, futuristic airplane with a sharply pointed nose, integrated wings, and a forward-set enclosed cockpit. It features retractable landing gear and illuminated accents, giving it a stealthy, high-tech appearance.
description_view_0: Front view shows the sharply pointed nose, angular fuselage, and the forward-set cockpit canopy.
description_view_1: Side view highlights the long, streamlined body, integrated wing design, and visible landing gear beneath the fuselage.
description_view_2: Rear view reveals the wide, flat tail section, rear vents, and the twin main landing gear units.
description_view_3: Opposite side view mirrors the other side, showing the sleek profile, integrated wings, and illuminated side panels.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: Blended wing-body configuration with mid-wing placement, no visible winglets, and a swept, integrated design.
attribute_engine_type: No visible external engines; likely internal jet or electric propulsion based on design.
attribute_tail_design: Conventional tail with a single vertical stabilizer and integrated horizontal stabilizers.
attribute_landing_gear_type: Retractable tricycle landing gear with two main units and one nose gear.
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, enclosed cockpit with a single canopy and likely single-seat configuration.
